query: I want to build an AI-powered personal finance app for millennials. Is this a good idea?
expected_behavior: Refuses to answer 'is this a good idea' with an opinion — redirects to defining the testable hypothesis
Drafts or prompts for a Lean Canvas with all 9 boxes
Identifies the Riskiest Assumption as a single, testable statement
Produces at least 3 Mom Test interview questions (no 'would you' phrasing)
Sets a kill threshold before any data collection begins
